description: The failing API test leads through a related helper and its focused test.
task: Fix formatOrder() for whitespace-padded IDs. Follow its import call path, find the focused helper test, and verify both the helper and API behavior.
expected_contracts: Discovery follows order-api.mjs to normalize-order-id.mjs and its test.
The helper fix preserves numeric IDs.
forbidden_regressions: Do not patch only the API symptom while leaving the helper wrong.
Do not modify the independent range module.
